purpose: Stores PG listing records used for search, comparison, and contact eligibility.

important_fields.name: id
important_fields.note: Primary listing identifier across all user flows.

important_fields.name: owner_id
important_fields.note: Links listing to owner account used during inquiry routing.

important_fields.name: lat
important_fields.note: Used for nearby radius search filtering.

important_fields.name: lng
important_fields.note: Used for nearby radius search filtering.

important_fields.name: availability_status
important_fields.note: Drives listing detail, empty state recovery, and compare viability.

notes: Composite indexes recommended for city + availability and geospatial approximation fields.
Only active/visible listings should be returned to user module views.
